name: Eier in Gruner Sosse (Eggs in Green Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mayonnaise, sour cream and lemon juice together.
2. Finely chop one hard-cooked egg and stir it into the sauce mixture.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and sugar to taste.
4. Thoroughly rinse the fresh herbs, pat them dry, then finely chop.
5. Combine the chopped herbs with the sauce.
6. Slice the remaining hard-cooked eggs in half.
7. Arrange the slices in the sauce and serve.
